name: Watermelon Seeds (Roasted & Salted)

pros.title: unusually protein-forward for a seed snack
pros.explanation: That gives it some practical appeal versus lighter snack foods.

pros.title: has clear crunchy snack appeal
pros.explanation: Easy to understand and package as a snack food.

pros.title: still brings some useful minerals
pros.explanation: Not devoid of nutritional upside despite the weaker category fit.

cons.title: salt load is a major practical negative
cons.explanation: The roasted salted format brings a clear real-world downside.

cons.title: weak fibre density for the seed category
cons.explanation: Seeds are supposed to dominate on fibre more convincingly than this.

cons.title: fat profile is rough for a seed-category food
cons.explanation: Too much saturated fat and not enough omega-3 support for this category.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
